components.name: Transfer
components.whenToUse:
- It is a select control essentially which can be use for selecting multiple items.
- Transfer can display more information for items and take up more space.

Transfer the elements between two columns in an intuitive and efficient way.

One or more elements can be selected from either column, one click on the proper `direction` button, and the transfer is done. The left column is considered the `source` and the right column is considered the `target`. As you can see in the API description, these names are reflected in.

> notice: Transfer is a controlled component, uncontrolled mode is not supported.
components.whenToUseZh:
- 需要在多个可选项中进行多选时。
- 比起 Select 和 TreeSelect，穿梭框占据更大的空间，可以展示可选项的更多信息。

穿梭选择框用直观的方式在两栏中移动元素，完成选择行为。

选择一个或以上的选项后，点击对应的方向键，可以把选中的选项移动到另一栏。其中，左边一栏为 `source`，右边一栏为 `target`，API 的设计也反映了这两个概念。

> 注意：穿梭框组件只支持受控使用，不支持非受控模式。

components.name: Tree
components.whenToUse: Almost anything can be represented in a tree structure. Examples include directories, organization hierarchies, biological classifications, countries, etc. The `Tree` component is a way of representing the hierarchical relationship between these things. You can also expand, collapse, and select a treeNode within a `Tree`.
components.whenToUseZh: 文件夹、组织架构、生物分类、国家地区等等，世间万物的大多数结构都是树形结构。使用 `树控件` 可以完整展现其中的层级关系，并具有展开收起选择等交互功能。

props.name: allowDrop
props.description: Whether to allow dropping on the node
props.descriptionZh: 是否允许拖拽时放置在该节点

props.name: autoExpandParent
props.description: Whether to automatically expand a parent treeNode

props.name: blockNode
props.description: Whether treeNode fill remaining horizontal space

props.name: checkable
props.description: Add a Checkbox before the treeNodes
props.descriptionZh: 当树为 checkable 时，设置独立节点是否展示 Checkbox

props.name: checkedKeys
props.description: (Controlled) Specifies the keys of the checked treeNodes (PS: When this specifies the key of a treeNode which is also a parent treeNode, all the children treeNodes of will be checked; and vice versa, when it specifies the key of a treeNode which is a child treeNode, its parent treeNode will also be checked. When `checkable` and `checkStrictly` is true, its object has `checked` and `halfChecked` property. Regardless of whether the child or parent treeNode is checked, they won't impact each other
props.descriptionZh: （受控）选中复选框的树节点（注意：父子节点有关联，如果传入父节点 key，则子节点自动选中；相应当子节点 key 都传入，父节点也自动选中。当设置 `checkable` 和 `checkStrictly`，它是一个有`checked`和`halfChecked`属性的对象，并且父子节点的选中与否不再关联

props.name: checkStrictly
props.description: Check treeNode precisely; parent treeNode and children treeNodes are not associated
props.descriptionZh: checkable 状态下节点选择完全受控（父子节点选中状态不再关联）

props.name: defaultCheckedKeys
props.description: Specifies the keys of the default checked treeNodes
props.descriptionZh: 默认选中复选框的树节点

props.descriptionZh: 默认展开指定的树节点

faq.question: How to hide file icon when use showLine?
faq.answer: File icon realize by using switcherIcon. You can overwrite the style to hide it: <https://codesandbox.io/s/883vo47xp8>

faq.question: Why defaultExpandAll not working on ajax data?
faq.answer: `default` prefix prop only works when initializing. So `defaultExpandAll` has already executed when ajax load data. You can control `expandedKeys` or render Tree when data loaded to realize expanded all.

faq.question: Virtual scroll limitation
faq.answer: Virtual scroll only render items in visible region. Thus not support auto width (like long `title` with horizontal scroll).

faq.question: What does `disabled` node work logic in the tree?
faq.answer:
Tree change its data by conduction. Includes checked or auto expanded, it will conduction state to parent / children node until current node is `disabled`. So if a controlled node is `disabled`, it will only modify self state and not affect other nodes. For example, a parent node contains 3 child nodes and one of them is `disabled`. When check the parent node, it will only check rest 2 child nodes. As the same, when check these 2 child node, parent will be checked whatever checked state the `disabled` one is.

This conduction logic prevent that modify `disabled` parent checked state by check children node and user can not modify directly with click parent which makes the interactive conflict. If you want to modify this conduction logic, you can customize it with `checkStrictly` prop.

faq.answer: We don't provide this since performance consideration. You can get by this way: <https://codesandbox.io/s/get-parent-node-in-onchange-eb1608>

demos.code:
import React from 'react'; import { Divider, Typography } from 'antd'; const { Title, Paragraph, Text, Link } = Typography; const blockContent = `AntV 是蚂蚁集团全新一代数据可视化解决方案，致力于提供一套简单方便、专业可靠、不限可能的数据可视化最佳实践。得益于丰富的业务场景和用户需求挑战，AntV 经历多年积累与不断打磨，已支撑整个阿里集团内外 20000+ 业务系统，通过了日均千万级 UV 产品的严苛考验。 我们正在基础图表，图分析，图编辑，地理空间可视化，智能可视化等各个可视化的领域耕耘，欢迎同路人一起前行。`; const App: React.FC = () => ( Introduction In the process of internal desktop applications development, many different design specs and implementations would be involved, which might cause designers and developers difficulties and duplication and reduce the efficiency of development. After massive project practice and summaries, Ant Design, a design language for background applications, is refined by Ant UED Team, which aims to{' '} uniform the user interface specs for internal background projects, lower the unnecessary cost of design differences and implementation and liberate the resources of design and front-end development . Guidelines and Resources We supply a series of design principles, practical patterns and high quality design resources (Sketch and Axure), to help people create their product prototypes beautifully and efficiently.
  • Principles
  • Patterns
  • Resource Download
Press Esc to exit... 介绍 蚂蚁的企业级产品是一个庞大且复杂的体系。这类产品不仅量级巨大且功能复杂，而且变动和并发频繁，常常需要设计与开发能够快速的做出响应。同时这类产品中有存在很多类似的页面以及组件，可以通过抽象得到一些稳定且高复用性的内容。 随着商业化的趋势，越来越多的企业级产品对更好的用户体验有了进一步的要求。带着这样的一个终极目标，我们（蚂蚁集团体验技术部）经过大量的项目实践和总结，逐步打磨出一个服务于企业级产品的设计体系 Ant Design。基于『确定』和『自然』 的设计价值观，通过模块化的解决方案，降低冗余的生产成本，让设计者专注于 更好的用户体验。 设计资源 我们提供完善的设计原则、最佳实践和设计资源文件（Sketch 和 Axure），来帮助业务快速设计出高质量的产品原型。

demos.title: Text and Link Component
demos.description: Provides multiple types of text and link.
demos.descriptionZh: 内置不同样式的文本以及超链接组件。
demos.code:
import React from 'react';
import { Space, Typography } from 'antd';

const { Text, Link } = Typography;

const App: React.FC = () => (
  <Space direction="vertical">
    <Text>Ant Design (default)</Text>
    <Text type="secondary">Ant Design (secondary)</Text>
    <Text type="success">Ant Design (success)</Text>
    <Text type="warning">Ant Design (warning)</Text>
    <Text type="danger">Ant Design (danger)</Text>
    <Text disabled>Ant Design (disabled)</Text>
    <Text mark>Ant Design (mark)</Text>
    <Text code>Ant Design (code)</Text>
    <Text keyboard>Ant Design (keyboard)</Text>
    <Text underline>Ant Design (underline)</Text>
    <Text delete>Ant Design (delete)</Text>
    <Text strong>Ant Design (strong)</Text>
    <Text italic>Ant Design (italic)</Text>
    <Link href="https://ant.design" target="_blank">
      Ant Design (Link)
    </Link>
  </Space>
);

export default App;

faq.question: How to use Typography.Link in react-router?
faq.answer:
`react-router` support [customize](https://github.com/ReactTraining/react-router/blob/master/packages/react-router-dom/docs/api/Link.md#component-reactcomponent) render component:

```tsx
<Link to="/" component={Typography.Link} />
```

**Note：** This is not equivalent to the execution logic of react-router's Link [reference](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/26737/files#r488769888)

components.name: Upload
components.whenToUse:
Uploading is the process of publishing information (web pages, text, pictures, video, etc.) to a remote server via a web page or upload tool.

- When you need to upload one or more files.
- When you need to show the process of uploading.
- When you need to upload files by dragging and dropping.
components.whenToUseZh:
上传是将信息（网页、文字、图片、视频等）通过网页或者上传工具发布到远程服务器上的过程。

- 当需要上传一个或一些文件时。
- 当需要展现上传的进度时。
- 当需要使用拖拽交互时。

props.name: accept
props.description: File types that can be accepted. See [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept)
props.descriptionZh: 接受上传的文件类型，详见 [input accept Attribute](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/input/file#accept)

props.name: beforeUpload
props.description: Hook function which will be executed before uploading. Uploading will be stopped with `false` or a rejected Promise returned. When returned value is `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`, the list of files that have been uploaded will ignore it. **Warning：this function is not supported in IE9**
props.descriptionZh: 上传文件之前的钩子，参数为上传的文件，若返回 `false` 则停止上传。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 reject 时则停止上传，resolve 时开始上传（ resolve 传入 `File` 或 `Blob` 对象则上传 resolve 传入对象）；也可以返回 `Upload.LIST_IGNORE`，此时列表中将不展示此文件。 **注意：IE9 不支持该方法**

props.name: customRequest
props.description: Override for the default xhr behavior allowing for additional customization and the ability to implement your own XMLHttpRequest
props.descriptionZh: 通过覆盖默认的上传行为，可以自定义自己的上传实现

props.name: data
props.description: Uploading extra params or function which can return uploading extra params
props.descriptionZh: 上传所需额外参数或返回上传额外参数的方法

props.name: defaultFileList
props.description: Default list of files that have been uploaded
props.descriptionZh: 默认已经上传的文件列表

props.name: fileList
props.description: List of files that have been uploaded (controlled). Here is a common issue [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423) when using it
props.descriptionZh: 已经上传的文件列表（受控），使用此参数时，如果遇到 `onChange` 只调用一次的问题，请参考 [#2423](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/2423)

props.name: headers
props.description: Set request headers, valid above IE10
props.descriptionZh: 设置上传的请求头部，IE10 以上有效

props.name: isImageUrl
props.descriptionZh: 自定义缩略图是否使用 <img /> 标签进行显示

props.name: itemRender
props.type: (originNode: ReactElement, file: UploadFile, fileList: object\[], actions: { download: function, preview: function, remove: function }) => React.ReactNode

props.name: listType
props.description: Built-in stylesheets, support for four types: `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` or `picture-circle`
props.descriptionZh: 上传列表的内建样式，支持四种基本样式 `text`, `picture`, `picture-card` 和 `picture-circle`

props.name: maxCount
props.description: Limit the number of uploaded files. Will replace current one when `maxCount` is `1`
props.descriptionZh: 限制上传数量。当为 1 时，始终用最新上传的文件代替当前文件

props.name: method
props.description: The http method of upload request

props.name: multiple
props.description: Whether to support selected multiple files. `IE10+` supported. You can select multiple files with CTRL holding down while multiple is set to be true
props.descriptionZh: 是否支持多选文件，`ie10+` 支持。开启后按住 ctrl 可选择多个文件

props.name: showUploadList
props.default: { showPreviewIcon?: boolean, showDownloadIcon?: boolean, showRemoveIcon?: boolean, previewIcon?: ReactNode \
props.description: Whether to show default upload list, could be an object to specify `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` and `downloadIcon` individually
props.descriptionZh: 是否展示文件列表, 可设为一个对象，用于单独设定 `showPreviewIcon`, `showRemoveIcon`, `showDownloadIcon`, `removeIcon` 和 `downloadIcon`

props.name: withCredentials
props.description: The ajax upload with cookie sent
props.descriptionZh: 上传请求时是否携带 cookie

props.name: onChange
props.description: A callback function, can be executed when uploading state is changing. It will trigger by every uploading phase. see [onChange](#onchange)
props.descriptionZh: 上传文件改变时的回调，上传每个阶段都会触发该事件。详见 [onChange](#onchange)

props.name: onDrop
props.description: A callback function executed when files are dragged and dropped into the upload area
props.descriptionZh: 当文件被拖入上传区域时执行的回调功能

props.name: onDownload
props.description: Click the method to download the file, pass the method to perform the method logic, and do not pass the default jump to the new TAB
props.descriptionZh: 点击下载文件时的回调，如果没有指定，则默认跳转到文件 url 对应的标签页

props.name: onPreview
props.description: A callback function, will be executed when the file link or preview icon is clicked
props.descriptionZh: 点击文件链接或预览图标时的回调

props.name: onRemove
props.description: A callback function, will be executed when removing file button is clicked, remove event will be prevented when the return value is false or a Promise which resolve(false) or reject
props.descriptionZh: 点击移除文件时的回调，返回值为 false 时不移除。支持返回一个 Promise 对象，Promise 对象 resolve(false) 或 reject 时不移除

props.name: uid

faq.question: How do I implement upload server side?
faq.answer:
- You can consult [jQuery-File-Upload](https://github.com/blueimp/jQuery-File-Upload/wiki#server-side) about how to implement server side upload interface.
- There is a mock example of [express](https://github.com/react-component/upload/blob/master/server.js) in rc-upload.

faq.question: I want to display download links.
faq.answer: Please set property `url` of each item in `fileList` to control the content of the link.

faq.question: How to use `customRequest`?
faq.answer: See <https://github.com/react-component/upload#customrequest>.

faq.question: Why will the `fileList` that's in control not trigger `onChange` `status` update when the file is not in the list?
faq.answer: `onChange` will only trigger when the file is in the list, it will ignore any events removed from the list. Please note that there does exist a bug which makes an event still trigger even when the file is not in the list before `4.13.0`.

faq.question: Why does `onChange` sometimes return File object and other times return { originFileObj: File }?
faq.answer: For compatible case, we return File object when `beforeUpload` return `false`. It will merge to `{ originFileObj: File }` in the next major version. Current version is compatible to get origin file by `info.file.originFileObj`. You can change this before a major release.

faq.question: Why sometimes Chrome can not upload?
faq.answer:
Chrome update will also break native upload. Please restart Chrome to finish the upload work.

Ref:

- [#32672](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32672)
- [#32913](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/32913)
- [#33988](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/issues/33988)

faq.question: Can still select files when uploading a folder in Safari?
faq.answer:
Inside the upload component, we use the `directory` and `webkitdirectory` properties to control only directories can be selected. However, in Safari's implementation it doesn't seem to work. See [here](https://stackoverflow.com/q/55649945/3040605). Please try passing an additional `accept` attribute that cannot match any files. For example:

```jsx
accept: `.${'n'.repeat(100)}`;
```

faq.question: Handle abnormal image watermarks
faq.answer:
When using an image watermark and the image loads abnormally, you can add `content` at the same time to prevent the watermark from becoming invalid (since 5.2.3).

```typescript jsx
<Watermark
  height={30}
  width={130}
  content="Ant Design"
  image="https://mdn.alipayobjects.com/huamei_7uahnr/afts/img/A*lkAoRbywo0oAAAAAAAAAAAAADrJ8AQ/original"
>
  <div style={{ height: 500 }} />
</Watermark>
```

globalTokens.description: Border radius of base components

globalTokens.description: Used to derive the base variable of the background color gradient. In v5, we added a layer of background color derivation algorithm to produce map token of background color. But PLEASE DO NOT USE this Seed Token directly in the code!

globalTokens.description: The font family of Ant Design prioritizes the default interface font of the system, and provides a set of alternative font libraries that are suitable for screen display to maintain the readability and readability of the font under different platforms and browsers, reflecting the friendly, stable and professional characteristics.
globalTokens.descriptionZh: Ant Design 的字体家族中优先使用系统默认的界面字体，同时提供了一套利于屏显的备用字体库，来维护在不同平台以及浏览器的显示下，字体始终保持良好的易读性和可读性，体现了友好、稳定和专业的特性。

globalTokens.description: Solid background color, currently only used for the default solid button background color.

globalTokens.description: The darkest fill color is used to distinguish between the second and third level of fill color, and is currently only used in the hover effect of Slider.

globalTokens.description: The weakest level of fill color is suitable for color blocks that are not easy to attract attention, such as zebra stripes, color blocks that distinguish boundaries, etc.
globalTokens.descriptionZh: 最弱一级的填充色，适用于不易引起注意的色块，例如斑马纹、区分边界的色块等。

globalTokens.description: The second level of fill color can outline the shape of the element more clearly, such as Rate, Skeleton, etc. It can also be used as the Hover state of the third level of fill color, such as Table, etc.
globalTokens.descriptionZh: 二级填充色可以较为明显地勾勒出元素形体，如 Rate、Skeleton 等。也可以作为三级填充色的 Hover 状态，如 Table 等。

globalTokens.description: The third level of fill color is used to outline the shape of the element, such as Slider, Segmented, etc. If there is no emphasis requirement, it is recommended to use the third level of fill color as the default fill color.
globalTokens.descriptionZh: 三级填充色用于勾勒出元素形体的场景，如 Slider、Segmented 等。如无强调需求的情况下，建议使用三级填色作为默认填色。

changes.description: - 🐞 Fix Button that two Chinese characters in nested span should have space between. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
- 🐞 Fix Button unexpected loading icon when conditional rendering. [](https://github.com/lzl0304)
🐞 Fix Tour that `step.type` didn't work when shown at first time. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fix Select and DatePicker that input should use `fontFamily` token. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fix Popover that should shift automaticly when overflowed. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fix Tooltip / Popover position jump when content height changed.
🛠 ComponentToken remove `radiusBase` must less than `16` limitation.
🐞 Fix Dropdown can not give `ref` for the root children rendered by `dropdownRender`.
🐞 Fix Table `cellPaddingBlock` not working.
🐞 Fix Input wrong height with small `controlHeight`.
🐞 Fix Typography style issue when `fontSize` is odd.
- 🤖 MISC: Fix `/react.2.22` React.Key type errors.
🐞 Fix Table selection column not align in center when `size` is `small`.
🐞 Fix Select style problem when `label` contains `div` element.
🐞 Fix Modal broken style of buttons when custom `footer`. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
🐞 Fix notification wrong pop-up animation when `placement` is `bottom`. [](https://github.com/linxianxi)
🐞 Fix missing inherited feedbackIcon in Form.Item with `noStyle`.
🐞 Fix Select that `controlHeightSM` not work in small size. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fix Rate that star transaform not at center. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
🐞 Fix DatePicker that in `dateTime` mode switching input didn't trigger `onCalendarChange`. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fix Table `virtual` selection checkbox or radio not align in center.
🐞 Fix Select carbin align top bug when enable `maxTagCount`.
🐞 Fix Select alignment issue when label is Typography.
💄 Fix Table with `virtual` display issue about columns less than table size and some border & hover style missing.
💄 Fix wrong style of Select in Input `addon`. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
💄 Fix Tree that Checkbox should be aligned with first line. [](https://github.com/MadCcc)
💄 Fix Card that Card.Grid has wrong style with left bottom corner. [-huang66](https://github.com/Jason-huang66)
💄 Fix Select/Cascader/TreeSelect style issue when customize their height.
- 🤖 Optimize `ref` type of Radio.Button. [](https://github.com/LexiosAlex)
- 🤖 Optimize `ref` type of Checkbox. [](https://github.com/LexiosAlex)
🆕 Button component has added three component tokens: `contentFontSize`, `contentFontSizeSM`, and `contentFontSizeLG`, allowing customization of font sizes for different sizes.
🆕 Form's `requiredMark` now supports custom rendering.
🆕 Tabs component has added a new component token `itemColor` to control the text color of normal tabs.
🆕 ColorPicker now supports `defaultFormat`. [](https://github.com/CYBYOB)
🆕 Form supports `feedbackIcons` and Form.Item supports `hasFeedback={{ icons: ... }}`, now feedback icons could be customized in both ways. [](https://github.com/gldio)
🆕 Added the `itemSelectedColor` component token to the Segmented component. [](https://github.com/xiaozisong)
🆕 Added support for custom function rendering in the Modal footer. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🆕 Added responsive setting support for `items.span` in Descriptions.
🆕 Added support for global configuration of `indicatorSize` in Tabs component through ConfigProvider.
🆕 Added the `direction` parameter to the `filterOption` function in the Transfer component. [](https://github.com/Zian502)
🆕 Added support for the `source` parameter in the `onSearch` method of the Input.Search component. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🆕 Added a component token to the Input component for customizing the shadow when activated.
🆕 Added a component token to the Radio component for customizing the color when the fill button is selected.
🆕 Tour component now supports horizontal offset for spacing. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🆕 Tour component now supports customizing the close button using the `closeIcon` prop. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🆕 Avatar component now supports configuring size using ConfigProvider. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🆕 List component now supports configuring size using ConfigProvider's `componentSize` option. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🆕 Cascader component now supports `autoClearSearchValue` option. [](https://github.com/linxianxi)

🆕 Added support for `rootClassName` in [Upload](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/44060),[AutoComplete](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/44055),[Badge.Ribbon](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/44056),[Input.TextArea](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/44058),[RangePicker](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/44057),[TimePicker](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/pull/44059) [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang).

💄 Refactored the structure of Modal.confirm to fix the width abnormality caused by `width: fit-content` and the style line break issue with a large amount of text. Extracted confirm styles for lazy loading to optimize style size in SSR.
💄 Adjusted the linear gradient colors for `circle` and `dashboard` in Progress to conical gradients.
💄 Fixed DatePicker missing custom footer style. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
💄 Fixed Tag where `tag.className` and `tag.style` did not work on Tag.CheckableTag in ConfigProvider.
💄 Fixed the inconsistency in width between the dropdown and the input box when the container of Select component has `transform: scale` style configured in `getPopupContainer` option.
🐞 Fixed an issue where Form.Item with `noStyle` configuration prevented the bound element from consuming `useStatus`.
🐞 Fixed an issue where using Tag within Popover/Popconfirm caused incorrect `font-size` on hover.
🐞 Fixed an issue where Input's default button had extra shadow. [](https://github.com/daledelv)
🐞 Fixed an issue where using Modal's hooks to close it with the `esc` key didn't correctly trigger the `await`.
🐞 Fixed the issue where the preset `size` of Space did not follow the Design Token, now compact mode correctly handles the corresponding spacing values. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🐞 Fixed the issue in Upload where the download button would still be displayed after clicking on it and moving the mouse out of the file. [-zbw](https://github.com/zbw-zbw)
🐞 Fix FloatButton that margin not work with `href` in FloatButton.Group. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fixed the issue where `fontSizeSM` token was not being applied to Button component. [](https://github.com/CHENGTIANG)
🐞 The Watermark now works in nested Modal and Drawer components.

🛠 Alert, Tree, Cascader, Layout, Table, Modal, Drawer, Button, Switch, Select, Badge, Form, TimePicker, Spin, Input, Progress, Divider Added Component Token. [](https://github.com/hms181231) [](https://github.com/linhf123) [](https://github.com/poyiding) [](https://github.com/Wxh16144) [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🛠 Remove compatibility logic for old versions of IE browser for Space and Grid components to reduce bundle size. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
- 🤖 Export BasicDataNode type from the Tree. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🛠 Optimize some styles size in document.head by extracting unused styles.
- 🛠 Notification and Message only generate styles when displayed.
- 🛠 Extract Tag status & preset color style which will only generate by needed.
- 🛠 Extract Button compact style, now only the corresponding style will be generated when Space.Compact is used.
- 🐞 Fix Form.Item children not hidden when `wrapperCol.span` is `0`. [](https://github.com/crazyair)
- 🐞 Fix Form `wrapperCol` to be 24 not working when `labelCol` is set to 24.
🐞 Fix Watermark that would crash if `content` is empty string.
🐞 Fix ColorPicker popup still working when `disabled` is `true`. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🐞 Fix Transfer trigger `onSelectChange` twice sometimes when click checkbox. [](https://github.com/kovsu)
🐞 Fix Typography scrollbar flush problem when enable `ellipsis`. [](https://github.com/bbb169)
- 🐞 Fix Slider draggable track unpredictable behavior. [](https://github.com/BoyYangzai) [](https://github.com/yoyo837)
- ⌨️ Improve Slider a11y behavior by adding `aria-orientation`. [react-component/slider#859](https://github.com/react-component/slider/pull/859) [](https://github.com/5im0n)
🐞 Fix Steps `type="nav"` last item did not hide arrow properly. [](https://github.com/ohhoney1)
- 🤖 Fix Upload file `status` definition to remove unused success status.
🛠 Refactor Badge style logic and take Ribbon style out to reduce SSR inline style size.
🐞 Fix the issue of abnormal icon styling when using `-design/icons` within App. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
🐞 Fix the issue of vertical dragging malfunction in Carousel. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🐞 Fix Tour panel use wrong design token.
🐞 Fix Form `wrapperCol` with responsive `xs` config not working.
🐞 Fix ColorPicker duplicate `key` issue. [](https://github.com/xr0master)
🐞 Fix Radio that not work in Tree title.
🐞 Fix Table that would crash when `filterDropdown` does not support `ref`.
🐞 Fix Form `inline` layout show extra bottom margin when validation failed.
🐞 Fix DatePicker `showTime` working error when `format` is Array. [](https://github.com/Zian502)
🐞 Fix Watermark can not be fully shown when `content` is too long.
- 🤖 Fix the type error with align property in Dropdown component. [](https://github.com/LeTuongKhanh)
- 🐞 Fix the cursor jumps when entering lowercase English letters in the ColorPicker color value input box. [](https://github.com/gouge666)
- 🐞 Fix the ColorPicker style is deformed under different sizes. [](https://github.com/kouchao)
🐞 Fix Descriptions throwing `key is not a prop` error message. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🐞 Fix the node is still rendered when Pagination `itemRender` is customized to `null`.
🐞 Fix Modal in Dropdown `menu.items`, rapid mouse movement when expanding Modal will make Dropdown reopen.
- 💄 Fix DatePicker content is not centered. [](https://github.com/Zian502)
- 💄 Optimize DatePicker selection range style. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
💄 Fix clicking on the Tabs area on the mobile terminal triggers a color change. [](https://github.com/yilaikesi)
- 💄 Fix the numbers in the Badge are also RTL when the text direction of the page is RTL. [](https://github.com/NotEvenANeko)
- 🐞 Fix DatePicker panel cannot toggle when selecting time with truthy `open` and truthy `defaultOpen`. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
- 🐞 Fix DatePicker and RangePicker still show the clear button when disable `allowClear`. [](https://github.com/bartpio)
- 🐞 Fix Carousel do not support `id` prop.
- 💄 Fix Carousel `dots` extra margin style.
🐞 Fix Modal footer disabled state that affect by Form. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
🐞 Fix Upload thumbnail that gif will not play. [](https://github.com/linxianxi)
🐞 Fix FloatButton that menu mode didn't support `badge` prop.
🐞 Fix Grid & List responsive config take effect after first render which cause screen flick.
🐞 Fix that Design Token partially missing when `-design/cssinjs` version `1.15.0`.
💄 Fix Badge `status="processing"` with `dot` wave style issue.
💄 Fix Descriptions border styles when it nests itself. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Fix Pagination transition style in prev/next buttons.
💄 Fix Popconfirm button group wraps unexpectedly. [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng)
💄 Optimize style of Image preview operation icons.
💄 Optimize Input and InputNumber font size in large mode. [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng)
💄 Remove Space part useless style.
🐞 Fix Checkbox & Radio not support customize wave and add className `ant-wave-target` for this case.
🐞 Adjust Form.Item renderProps definition to return correct `FormInstance`.
🐞 Fixed Table incorrect expand icon direction and row indentation in RTL. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
💄 Fix Pagination that should not have hover and focus style when disabled.
- 🤖 Fix Drawer & Anchor part Design Token TS description not correct issue. [](https://github.com/wving5)
🐞 Fix Select, TreeSelect, Cascader, DatePicker unexpected warning of deprecated `clearIcon` [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
- 🤖 Export Design Token `MappingAlgorithm` as type of theme algorithm.
🆕 Form support `getFieldsValue({ strict: true })` to support only Item bind values.
🆕 Descriptions support `items` prop. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🆕 ColorPicker support `disabledAlpha` prop. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🆕 Avatar.Group support `shape` prop. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🆕 AutoComplete/Cascader/DatePicker/Input.Textarea/TimePicker/TreeSelect support `allowClear` prop to customize clear button. [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang)
🆕 DatePicker.RangePicker `presets` support callback functions. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
🆕 Added the `preview={{ movable: Boolean }}` prop to the Image component to support dragging and dropping into folders. [](https://github.com/linxianxi)
🆕 Slider `tooltip` support `autoAdjustOverflow` prop.
🆕 Added the `selectionsIcon` property to the Transfer component to support custom icons for the dropdown menu. [-jia-nan](https://github.com/li-jia-nan)
🗑 Select, Tree-Select and Cascader deprecated `showArrow` prop. Now suffix arrow should be configured with `suffixIcon`. [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng)
🐞 Optimized the import method for `-design/icons` to avoid importing all icons. [](https://github.com/ssxenon01)
🐞 Fix Anchor not trigger `getCurrentAnchor` when scroll.
🐞 Fix Tooltip `hover` not trigger on `disabled` element.
🐞 Fix ColorPicker not calling `onChangeComplete` callback when changing value. [](https://github.com/RedJue)
🐞 Fix `Modal.confirm` `locale` setting were reset. [](https://github.com/Yuiai01)
🐞 Fix Slider description info and slider handle overlap issue. [](https://github.com/Wxh16144)
🐞 Fix InputNumber handler style in large size. [](https://github.com/yee94)
🐞 Fix Select popup flip position motion not correct.

💄 Optimized `-design/icons` the design of icons including CloseCircleFilled/CloseSquareFilled/CloseOutlined/CloseCircleOutlined/CloseSquareOutlined/ExportOutlined/ImportOutlined. [824500](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design-icons/commit/824500349894a87562f033dbdc5e3c5d301a2f5c)
💄 Fix when using with other component libraries that use `-design/cssinjs`, antd styles will always be inserted at the top to avoid style override issues caused by loading order.
💄 Optimize message and notification to not to extract style in SSR.
⌨️ Fix Select `aria-activedescendant` didn't conform to valid value.
⌨️ Fix `Layout.Header` accessibility role. [](https://github.com/khalibloo)

🆕 Image supports `imageRender`, `toolbarRender` attributes to support custom rendering of preview images and toolbars, also supports new props such as `onTransform`, `minScale`, `maxScale`. Image.PreviewGroup supports `items` attribute to pass in list data, and fixes that the native attributes of the img tag are not passed to preview images The problem. [](https://github.com/linxianxi)

🆕 Modify the layout style of the Image preview, the `preview` attribute supports `closeIcon`, Image.PreviewGroup supports the `fallback` attribute, and fixes the problem of loading preview resources in advance. [](https://github.com/linxianxi)

🛠 Resolved Circular dependency issue in vite, rollup, meteor and microbundle. . Thanks to [](https://github.com/jrr997), [-tang](https://github.com/kiner-tang) and [](https://github.com/MuxinFeng) for their contributions.

- 💄 Fix Space.Compact component style problem when wrapping Modal, Dropdown, Drawer and other components. [](https://github.com/foryuki)

🛠 Remove `Moment.js` dependency.
🛠 Fix `CompoundedComponent` ts error. [](https://github.com/wangcch)
🛠 Rollback `lib` in package. [](https://github.com/chunsch)
💄 New Design
- 💄 Change primary color to `#1677ff`.
- 💄 Change basic border radius to `6px`, and support gradient radius.
- 💄 Optimize transition duration.
- 💄 Optimize padding and remove border for some components.
- 💄 Pagination remove border.
- 💄 Optimize Timeline style.
- 💄 Optimize Steps style.
- 💄 Optimize focus style for some components.
- 💄 Optimize style with large border radius.
- 💄 Optimize Table hover style.
- 💄 Optimize Segmented hover style.
- 💄 Optimize Dropdown hover style.
- 💄 Optimize close button style for some components like Modal.
- 💄 Optimize Menu style.
- 💄 Optimize hover style for some more components.
- 💄 Optimize Switch transition.
- 💄 Optimize Anchor ink ball style.
🆕 Export object `theme` which contains hooks and algorithms related with theme.
- 🆕 Add `theme.useToken` hook to get Design Token in context.
- 🆕 Preset algorithm
- 🆕 Default algorithm `theme.defaultAlgorithm`.
- 🆕 Dark algorithm `theme.darkAlgorithm`.
- 🆕 Compact algorithm `theme.compactAlgorithm`.
🆕 ConfigProvider support `theme` prop to modify theme configuration. For more: [Customize Theme](https://ant.design/docs/react/customize-theme).
- 🆕 Support multiple `algorithm` pipeline.
- 🆕 Support switching wireframe style.
- 🆕 Support override Design Token for single component.
🆕 Add `locale` directory in package, which contains commonjs locale files. [](https://github.com/chunsch)
🗑 Do not support IE browser anymore.
🗑 Remove package `antd/lib`.
- 🛠 Change `main` in `package.json` to `dist/antd.js`. [eb8835f](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/commit/eb8835fe29b39767c0f5e310f5c69619a75d5840)
🗑 Remove `dist/antd.css`, and add `dist/reset.css` to override common styles.
🗑 Deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead in components below. [](https://github.com/yykoypj)
- 🗑 Tag deprecate `visible`.
- 🗑 Table deprecate `filterDropdownVisible` and provide `filterDropdownOpen`.
- 🗑 Drawer deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead.
- 🗑 Modal deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead.
- 🗑 Dropdown deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead.
- 🗑 Tooltip deprecate `visible` and provide `open` instead, Popover and Popconfirm.
🗑 Deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead in components below. [](https://github.com/heiyu4585)
- 🗑 AutoComplete deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 Mentions deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 Cascader deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 Select deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 TreeSelect deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
- 🗑 DatePicker and TimePicker deprecate `dropdownClassName` and provide `popupClassName` instead.
🛠 Refactor styles with CSS-in-JS for all components.
- 🗑 Remove less and css in package.

🛠 Change date library from Moment.js to Day.js, for more: [Use custom date library](https://ant.design/docs/react/use-custom-date-library). [b22815d](https://github.com/ant-design/ant-design/commit/b22815d4d223b80755b472e14d7888beab8dd1da) [](https://github.com/iamkun)
🛠 React Notification to support React 18 concurrent mode and refactor useNotification hook，which is preferred instead of static function.
🛠 Slider props related with Tooltip are unified into `tooltip`. [](https://github.com/yykoypj)
🛠 Migrate official site to [dumi](https://next.d.umijs.org/).
